rationale: Check round re-verified both blocking findings against the fix-up diff. CR-001 resolved: CODEMIE_NPM_PREFIX row now reads 'CODEMIE_INSTALL_MODE resolves to user-prefix' — matches the documented env var. CR-002 resolved: macOS log path softened to attribution framing with the plan doc's file path (~/Library/Logs/CodeMie/wizard.log), no longer stated as unverifiable certainty. Fix-up diff is 2+/8- on the same single file, introduces no new high-risk issue (docs-only, no security/API/runtime surface). business_review and standards_review carried forward unchanged from the final round.

business_review.criterion: 1. macOS .dmg in intro + distribution list + new wizard section
5. Name Windows portable vs macOS auto modes
6. Keep Windows wizard / Release Artifacts / Defaults verbatim
business_review.notes: Wizard + Release Artifacts byte-identical; Defaults prose edited to satisfy criterion 5 — resolved by design

standards_review.notes: docs(cli): ... matches Conventional Commits; scope 'cli' in allowed enum

finding_status.evidence: fix-up diff line: '+| CODEMIE_NPM_PREFIX | $HOME/.codemie/npm-prefix | npm prefix used when CODEMIE_INSTALL_MODE resolves to user-prefix |'

fix-up diff replaces the over-certain directory path with 'Wizard output is written to ~/Library/Logs/CodeMie/wizard.log (per the macOS installer plan; the wizard source lives in a separate repository).'
